metadata.name: Japan Briefing
metadata.description: Daily news briefing for the NYT Tokyo Bureau Chief

all.headline: トランプ大統領 軍事作戦「当初予定を大きく前倒している」
all.description: アメリカのトランプ大統領は、9日開いた記者会見でイランに対する軍事作戦について「われわれは非常に迅速に彼らを打ち負かしている。当初の予定を大きく前倒している」と述べました。

all.headline: トランプ大統領とプーチン大統領 イラン情勢めぐり電話会談
all.description: アメリカのトランプ大統領とロシアのプーチン大統領が9日、イラン情勢などをめぐって電話で会談しました。

all.headline: 中東の日本人旅行者ら281人乗せた第2便 成田空港に到着
all.description: 中東にとどまっていた日本人旅行客ら281人を乗せたチャーター機の第2便が、10日朝、サウジアラビアから成田空港に到着しました。日本政府は今後、追加の運航も行うことにしています。

all.headline: 除染土の福島県外の処分 “理解”重要【震災15年アンケート】
all.description: 東日本大震災と東京電力福島第一原子力発電所の事故の発生から、まもなく15年となります。福島県沿岸と原発事故で避難指示が出された地域などに住む人に行ったNHKのアンケートで、中間貯蔵施設で保管されている、除染で出た土などの福島県外の最終処分に向けて、「国民の理解」や「再生利用の広がり」などが重要だとする声が多くなりました。

all.headline: 東京大空襲から81年 海老名香葉子さんの遺志継いで 平和の集い
all.description: 10万人が犠牲となった東京大空襲から3月10日で81年です。都内では9日、平和を祈る集いが開かれ、みずからも空襲で家族を亡くしたエッセイストの故・海老名香葉子さんの遺志を継いだ人たちが犠牲者を悼みました。

all.headline: トルコ “イランから弾道ミサイル 領空侵入” NATO部隊が迎撃
all.description: アメリカとイスラエルによる軍事作戦とイランによる報復攻撃が続く中、トルコは9日も、イランから弾道ミサイルが発射され領空に侵入したなどと発表しました。アメリカは、イランによる周辺国への攻撃に対する非難を強めています。

all.headline: 楽天モバイルの不正契約サイト運営か 19歳容疑者逮捕 警視庁
all.description: 携帯電話会社の「楽天モバイル」の回線を、他人名義で不正に契約できるウェブサイトを作成・管理して不正な契約を手助けした疑いで、19歳の容疑者が逮捕されたことが捜査関係者への取材で分かりました。警視庁はこのサイトを通じておよそ1000回線が不正に契約されていたとみて、詳しく調べています。

all.headline: Sumo: Yokozuna Onosato suffers 2nd straight loss, Aonishiki also beaten
all.description: Yokozuna Onosato fell to his second straight loss after two days at the Spring Grand Sumo Tournament on Monday as Ukrainian ozeki Read full story here

all.description: Tokyo stocks plunged Monday, with the Nikkei index losing over 2,800 points and marking the third-largest point drop in history, aRead full story here

all.headline: South Korea punches ticket to World Baseball Classic quarterfinals
all.description: South Korea won a three-way tiebreaker to advance.

all.headline: In first, Japan to deploy homegrown long-range missiles on March 31
all.description: The deployment, which the Defense Ministry moved forward by one year, comes as the Chinese military ramps up its training around Japan’s far-flung islands near Taiwan.

all.headline: Bad Bunny plays first-ever Japan show at exclusive Spotify event
all.description: The Puerto Rican superstar’s Japan debut drew roughly 2,300 top listeners and celebrity guests for an invite-only show near Tokyo.

all.headline: China condemns 'evil designs' of Taiwan premier's Japan visit
all.description: China, which views democratically governed Taiwan as its own territory, routinely lambasts any overseas trips by its leaders.

all.headline: 2,519 still unaccounted for 15 years after quake and tsunami
all.description: The death toll from the disaster came to 15,901 in 12 prefectures.

all.headline: Shogakukan apologizes for rehiring author with sex crime past
all.description: According to Shogakukan, a company executive visited the office of the victim’s lawyer on Thursday and apologized to her by phone.

all.headline: Japan bankruptcies reach 13-year high in February
all.description: The figure marked a year-on-year rise of 11.3% and the third consecutive monthly increase.

all.headline: Oil’s dramatic rally sends Japanese stocks, bonds and currency down
all.description: Prices recovered later on Monday on reports of possible intervention.

all.headline: Unification Church appeals dissolution order to top court
all.description: The special appeal came after the Tokyo High Court last week upheld the dissolution order issued by the Tokyo District Court.

all.headline: British lessons about American decline
all.description: Trump and his followers’ time would be better spent examining how Britain struggled with the loss of global preeminence.

India offered sanctuary to Iranian ship three days before US sank it
all.description: India says Tehran sought permission to dock three ships on the day the US and Israel began a war on Iran.

all.headline: India erupts in celebration after T20 cricket World Cup victory
all.description: India defeated New Zealand by 96 runs in the western city of Ahmedabad, on Sunday, to defend their T20 World Cup title.

all.headline: Five Iranian footballers granted Australian visas after anthem protest
all.description: Concern has grown for team after one critic called them 'wartime traitors' for failing to salute during the Iranian anthem.

all.headline: Alleged Bondi gunman seeks order to suppress family's identity
all.description: Naveed Akram is seeking to prevent media publishing details about his mother, sister and brother.

all.headline: G7 to take 'necessary measures' to support energy supplies
all.description: Finance ministers and the IEA discussed options for stabilising oil prices which surpassed $100.

all.headline: Dancers loved practising in this Singapore walkway. Then the complaints came
all.description: In super-organised Singapore, disputes over public space are a battle between control and chaos.

all.headline: The heartwarming tale of a father, a daughter, and a wedding band wowing India
all.description: Band Baaja Bitiya is the moving tale of a father who goes to rescue his daughter from her matrimonial home.

all.headline: Indonesia to ban social media and other online platforms for under 16s
all.description: It is the latest country to curb young people's access to digital spaces to try and protect them from abuse.

all.headline: Sri Lanka takes control of second Iranian vessel a day after US sub attack
all.description: The South Asian country is caught in the middle of the US-Israeli military campaign against Iran.

all.headline: Hong Kong pro-democracy tycoon Jimmy Lai will not appeal conviction
all.description: Lai was convicted and sentenced to 20 years in jail last month on charges for sedition and collusion with foreign forces.

all.headline: How Indonesia's new sex laws will affect tourists
all.description: International travelers have been flocking back to the popular resort island of Bali as the Covid pandemic subsides, prompting hopes that Indonesia's battered tourism industry is on the road to recove

North Korea
This 'edible' plastic bag alternative could save Nara's sacred deer
all.description: A local entrepreneur in the Japanese tourist destination of Nara has developed an alternative to plastic shopping bags, to protect the town's sacred deer.

all.headline: The battle to save Sri Lanka's leopards
all.description: Having endured a bloody civil war from 1983 until 2009, Sri Lanka is now at peace and developing rapidly. That's good news for the country as a whole, but the island nation's leopards are under threat

all.headline: Wildlife is flourishing around Fukushima
all.description: Nearly a decade after Japan's Fukushima nuclear disaster, researchers have discovered that wildlife is thriving in the areas evacuated by humans, despite radiological contamination.

all.headline: China debuts 620 kph train prototype
all.description: China has revealed a prototype for a new high-speed Maglev train that is capable of reaching speeds of 620 kilometers (385 miles) per hour.

all.headline: A Shanghai building 'walks' to a new location
all.description: Shanghai residents passing through the city's eastern Huangpu district in October might have stumbled upon an unusual sight: a "walking" building.

all.headline: Self-driving robotaxis are taking off in China
all.description: The world has been inching toward fully autonomous cars for years. In China, one company just got even closer to making it a reality.

all.headline: Travel to Japan during Covid-19: What you need to know
all.description: If you're planning a trip to Japan, here's what you'll need to know and expect if you want to visit during the global coronavirus pandemic.

primary.headline: トランプ大統領 軍事作戦「当初予定を大きく前倒している」
primary.description: アメリカのトランプ大統領は、9日開いた記者会見でイランに対する軍事作戦について「われわれは非常に迅速に彼らを打ち負かしている。当初の予定を大きく前倒している」と述べました。

primary.headline: トランプ大統領とプーチン大統領 イラン情勢めぐり電話会談
primary.description: アメリカのトランプ大統領とロシアのプーチン大統領が9日、イラン情勢などをめぐって電話で会談しました。

primary.headline: 中東の日本人旅行者ら281人乗せた第2便 成田空港に到着
primary.description: 中東にとどまっていた日本人旅行客ら281人を乗せたチャーター機の第2便が、10日朝、サウジアラビアから成田空港に到着しました。日本政府は今後、追加の運航も行うことにしています。

primary.headline: 除染土の福島県外の処分 “理解”重要【震災15年アンケート】
primary.description: 東日本大震災と東京電力福島第一原子力発電所の事故の発生から、まもなく15年となります。福島県沿岸と原発事故で避難指示が出された地域などに住む人に行ったNHKのアンケートで、中間貯蔵施設で保管されている、除染で出た土などの福島県外の最終処分に向けて、「国民の理解」や「再生利用の広がり」などが重要だとする声が多くなりました。

primary.headline: 東京大空襲から81年 海老名香葉子さんの遺志継いで 平和の集い
primary.description: 10万人が犠牲となった東京大空襲から3月10日で81年です。都内では9日、平和を祈る集いが開かれ、みずからも空襲で家族を亡くしたエッセイストの故・海老名香葉子さんの遺志を継いだ人たちが犠牲者を悼みました。

primary.headline: トルコ “イランから弾道ミサイル 領空侵入” NATO部隊が迎撃
primary.description: アメリカとイスラエルによる軍事作戦とイランによる報復攻撃が続く中、トルコは9日も、イランから弾道ミサイルが発射され領空に侵入したなどと発表しました。アメリカは、イランによる周辺国への攻撃に対する非難を強めています。

primary.headline: 楽天モバイルの不正契約サイト運営か 19歳容疑者逮捕 警視庁
primary.description: 携帯電話会社の「楽天モバイル」の回線を、他人名義で不正に契約できるウェブサイトを作成・管理して不正な契約を手助けした疑いで、19歳の容疑者が逮捕されたことが捜査関係者への取材で分かりました。警視庁はこのサイトを通じておよそ1000回線が不正に契約されていたとみて、詳しく調べています。

screenshots.name: Takaichi Sanae
tweets:
A government-chartered plane carrying a total of 281 Japanese nationals who were staying in Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, and Saudi Arabia recently arrived at Narita Airport from Riyadh, the capital of Saudi Arabia.

I'm sure you're very tired from the long flight as well as the land transportation from the country you're staying in. Once again, I wish you good health.

Today, I met with IMF Managing Director Georgieva.
This was our first reunion since we met at the G20 Summit held in Johannesburg, South Africa in November last year.

Following the government-chartered flight from Oman that arrived at Narita Airport last night, a government-chartered flight carrying people eligible for departure assistance recently departed from Riyadh, the capital of Saudi Arabia.

A government-chartered plane carrying a total of 107 Japanese nationals who were staying in the United Arab Emirates and Oman recently arrived at Narita Airport from Muscat, the capital of Oman.

I'm sure you're all very tired from the long flight, in addition to the land transportation from where you're staying. Once again, I wish you good health.

The ``Special Anti-Fraud App Recommended by the National Police Agency,'' which I introduced in a recent post, is now available for download.

The ``Special Anti-Fraud App Recommended by the National Police Agency'' is equipped with features such as blocking international calls and fraudulent calls, making it possible to cut off ``mobile phone contact'' with criminals.
